persona_set_note: md5 + lastUpdated of the canonical 22-…/persona-categories.json this asset was built against. The N38 count-triad assertion (qc-assert-repo-consistency.py:_persona_set_triad_failures) and persona-set-asset-consistency-guard.yml fail CI if blueprint dirs != categories keys != persona_count != canonical_persona_count. Rebuild incrementally via shared-utils/prebuilt-index/build-and-publish.sh (HASH-SKIP embeds only the delta) — NEVER a full re-embed.
section_tag_note: embeddings table carries section_number + mode columns. coaching rows at section_number=3, leadership/governance rows at section_number=4. mode values: {both, coaching, leadership}. Section-tagged rows allow mode-aware retrieval without a full re-index.

delta_provider_backstamp.status: PUBLISHED 2026-06-29 (v2.2.1 asset live on GitHub Releases; backstamp included)
delta_provider_backstamp.defect: gemini-section-indexer.py INSERT omitted provider/model/dim columns. The 11 delta personas added to v2.2.0 arrived with provider=NULL, model=NULL, dim=NULL. init_db() backfill only fires when columns are absent — it never re-runs on existing NULL rows — so the prebuilt v2.2.0 asset shipped with 161 blank-provider rows across the 11 newest personas.
delta_provider_backstamp.fix: gemini-section-indexer.py INSERT now explicitly writes provider='gemini', model=GEMINI_MODEL, dim=GEMINI_OUTPUT_DIM on every row. build-and-publish.sh step 1.5 backstamps any remaining NULL rows after downloading the base asset (no re-embed: inferred from blob length 12288 bytes = 3072 dims * 4 bytes/float32). ensure_v2_1_schema() now adds provider/model/dim columns.
delta_provider_backstamp.verified: provider='gemini', model='gemini-embedding-2', dim=3072 confirmed on ALL rows of the published v2.2.1 asset (935 section rows / 65 personas — the converged section-level set; re-verified 2026-07-04 by downloading the asset). get_db_index_provider() returns ('gemini', 'gemini-embedding-2') cleanly.

pr363_personas.note: All 10 PR-363 canonical personas are present in this asset under their canonical slugs, section-tagged (first shipped in v2.1.0; carried forward since).

orphan_blueprints_shipped.note: All 3 orphan-blueprint personas are present in this asset under their canonical slugs, section-tagged, fully operational for both Coaching Mode and Task/Agent-Governance mode (first shipped in v2.1.0).

notes: v2.2.1 — canonical 65-persona SECTION-CONVERGED asset with GA gemini-embedding-2 @3072: 65 personas / 935 section rows / 65 source files, one row per '## Section N' with section_number + mode tags (coaching=3, leadership=4; mode in {both, coaching, leadership}). Every vector is float32 @ dim 3072; every row is stamped provider=gemini/model=gemini-embedding-2/dim=3072 (the 161 blank-provider delta rows from v2.2.0 were backstamped). Replaces the chunk-level v2.1.0 (54 personas / 4413 chunks). Clients download this asset instead of re-embedding per box. SHA256 verified at build time and before install. Publishing a delta: shared-utils/prebuilt-index/build-and-publish.sh — hermetic temp-dir staging, HASH-SKIP embeds only new/changed personas, REAL-VECTOR HARD GATE (every row gemini/3072) + count triad must pass before upload; then update tests/unit/prebuilt-index-section-tagged.test.sh (KNOWN_TAGS + counts) and this manifest is bumped automatically. Full procedure: docs/EMBEDDINGS.md. ROHDE NOTE (open): rohde-the-sketchnote-workbook has a selector category-map gap (_CATEGORY_DOMAINS['design'] does not include visual-storytelling); fix deferred pending per-box index validation.
asset_verified: 2026-07-04: downloaded the published v2.2.1 asset; sha256 matches this manifest (27a8cc0f...2280); 935 rows / 65 personas / 65 files; every vector 3072-dim float32; single (provider,model,dim) = (gemini, gemini-embedding-2, 3072).
